rationale: Section 25.22 governs submission of appraisal records to the ARB and requires delivery of certain notices first. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b), so raising the exemption does not conflict with this procedural provision.
quote: By May 15 or as soon thereafter as practicable, the chief appraiser shall submit the completed appraisal records to the appraisal review board for review and determination of protests.
_note: No direct conflict; §25.22 is procedural and does not reference §11.13(b) exemption amounts.
